title: Apple stalls launch of two new smart home devices as it waits for Gemini powered Siri AI: Report
snippet: Apple has developed new products: HomePod mini and Apple TV. The company has reportedly not launched them due to delays in Siri and AI upgrades.&nbsp;

title: Mint Explainer | Can IBM reboot its AI play with $11 billion Confluent buyout?
snippet: Through Confluent’s real-time data streaming technology, IBM is betting on faster, more reliable data pipelines. But can this help reassert the Big Blue's AI play?

title: Elon Musk launches Terafab, unveils ‘most epic’ AI chip factory for Tesla and SpaceX
snippet: Elon Musk has launched Terafab as a joint venture between Tesla and SpaceX. The initative is aimed at creating a comprehensive chip manufacturing facility in Austin, Texas. The facility will address AI chip shortages and produce chips for Tesla vehicles, humanoid robots, and space applications.

title: Is iPhone Fold launch delayed? New leak reveals Apple's ‘Ultra’ iPhone may mirror iPhone X strategy
snippet: Apple's foldable phone may face another delay, if a new leak is to be believed. The Ultra iPhone from the company may not launch alongside the iPhone 18 Pro lineup in September.

title: ‘Reddit is for humans’: Social media platform may soon ask to see your face to keep AI bots out
snippet: &nbsp;Reddit's CEO Steve Huffman has said that the platform may use Touch ID or Face ID to keep AI bots out. Huffman also noted that Reddit wants to maintain user anonymity while maintaining authenticity.

title: What is Vibe Coding? Who coined the word? Why are Sundar Pichai, Sridhar Vembu debating over it?

title: WhatsApp could soon add a feature that auto-deletes messages within 15 minutes: here's how it works
snippet: WhatsApp is reportedly developing a privacy upgrade for its disappearing messages feature that could allow users to set a timer that deletes messages 15 minutes after being read.&nbsp;

title: Samsung Galaxy A37, A57 confirmed to launch in India on 25 March: Expected price, specs and more
snippet: Samsung's Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 are all set to debut in India on 25 March. The two phones are likely to be powered by the Exynos processors while coming with an AMOLED display and a 5,000mAh battery.

snippet: Executives warned that risks such as prompt injection, data exposure and vulnerabilities in widely used models could trigger large-scale impact, raising the threat of a wave of shadow AI-or use of unapproved AI tools-if governance frameworks fail to keep pace.

title: ET Graphics: Bank frauds value tripled in 2025
snippet: ​​The value of bank frauds in India nearly tripled to Rs 36,014 crore in 2025, indicating a shift toward significantly higher-value attacks as fraudsters exploit real-time payments, instant onboarding, authentication and transaction layers, according to a report by fraud prevention platform Bureau.
